sections.paragraph:
Original: מתני

Transliteration: mithnı̂y

Phonetic: mith-nee'

BDB Definition:

Mithnite = "athlete"
  1. unknown derivation
    1. used in description of Joshaphat, one of David's guards

Origin: probably patrial from an unused noun meaning slenderness

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
